736590.name: Operation: Harsh Doorstop
736590.html_disclosure: The developers describe how their game uses AI Generated Content like this: Our team utilizes AI in a variety of ways to improve the quality of our game. Here are a few examples of how our team incorporates AI into our development process: 1. We use AI to translate dialogue, subtitles, and (more infrequently) music into a variety of different languages spoken by players of our game. This allows more players from different regions to enjoy playing Operation: Harsh Doorstop in their own language, and helps us reach more players throughout the world. 2. We utilize machine learning to help train our NPC bots, giving non-player characters more realistic and adaptive behavior on the battlefield. 3. We utilize AI to assist with finding bugs and other issues in the game, which our developers can then diagnose and fix. We currently work with the RevoltGPT team to help us incorporate AI into our development workflows. If you're interested in learning more, you can visit their website at https://rvt.dev

2329760.name: Vampire Memories - 吸血鬼的回忆
2329760.html_disclosure: The developers describe how their game uses AI Generated Content like this: In the localization of multi-language translation of the game, the developer uses translation software to translate the languages of different countries. The translation software describes the use of neural networks for translation, which I think may be related to AI translation; Since the developer does not understand the language of other countries, the developer does not have the funds to hire a professional translator, so the multi-language support is handled by translation software. Please forgive me if this automated translation causes any language offense, and please let me know. I will correct it in time. Sometimes you'll see me write words in English in parentheses, so that the translation software can correctly identify what I'm trying to say; In addition, the developers did not use AI to generate images, audio and other content;

1833100.name: FrameFusion Motion Interpolation
1833100.html_disclosure: The developers describe how their game uses AI Generated Content like this: The app processes the frames from the video and uses AI to predict how much movement each pixel has along the X and Y axes. The AI model then generates optical flow data for both axes, which are just floating-point numbers for X and Y. With this information, traditional methods are used to create a new frame by combining parts of the two original frames. The AI doesn't generate new RGB data; it only uses the RGB data from the original frames.

This approach enabled our three-person team to concentrate on core design and game mechanics.
